title: Maya on where father went wrong — early family-archaeology note
html:
Maya on where father went wrong — early family-archaeology note

Source: 2019-10-31 Apple Note (HS senior year). Maya (cousin / family-elder) gives Yahir a thesis on his dad's trajectory. Yahir captures it before forgetting.

TL;DR

  • Maya's thesis on dad: he had "so much liberty from a young age" — the unboundedness was the wound. Yahir's reaction: "Fuck me..." — implicit recognition of inheriting the pattern.
  • Maya was "dominated her whole life" — counter-pattern in the same family generation; sets up the lineage as fate tension Yahir wrestles with later.
  • "My mom was always a single respected unit because of my dad, that is where they went wrong" — Maya's read on parents' marriage dynamic; mom's identity subsumed by dad's role.
  • This is the earliest family-diagnosis note in the corpus — Yahir doing amateur family-systems analysis at age ~17, sourcing from the next-generation aunt figure.
  • Sets up the long arc: 2024 01 dad in bad state → 2025 03 dad getting better but relapse coming.

Connections

  • maya — primary source of family-history readings
  • dad wisdom — counter-perspective from the same family
  • lineage as fate
  • yahir family
  • 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state — later arc
  • mom house by the river — implied response (give mom her own respected unit)
